name: sum_range_id
code:
import Mathlib

theorem sum_range_id (n : ℕ) : (Finset.range n).sum id = n * (n - 1) / 2 := by
  exact Finset.sum_range_id n

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) :
    (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  rw [Nat.add_comm]

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  rw [Nat.add_comm]

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : ℕ) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b :=
  Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by decide) h

name: fintype_pigeonhole
code:
import Mathlib

theorem fintype_pigeonhole (α β : Type) [Fintype α] [Fintype β] [DecidableEq α] [DecidableEq β]
    (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) (f : α → β) :
    ¬Function.Injective f := by
  intro hf
  have := Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf
  linarith

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  rw [Nat.add_comm]

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le [DecidableEq β] (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) : (s.image f).card ≤ s.card := by
  exact Finset.card_image_le

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : ¬¬b = b := by
  cases b <;> simp

name: pow_add
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_add_nat (a b : ℕ) : 2^(a + b) = 2^a * 2^b := by
  rw [Nat.pow_add]

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type} [PartialOrder α] {β γ δ : Set α}
    (h : β ⊆ γ) (h' : γ ⊆ δ) : β ⊆ δ :=
  Set.Subset.trans h h'

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type} (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ]
    {f : α → β} {g : β → γ} (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) :
    StrictMono (g ∘ f) := by
  exact StrictMono.comp hg hf

theorem card_powerset (s : Finset α) : s.powerset.card = 2 ^ s.card := by

name: de_morgan_not_and
code:
import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (p q : Prop) : ¬(p ∧ q) ↔ (¬p ∨ ¬q) := by
  rw [not_and_or]

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2^n >= 1 := by
  apply Nat.one_le_pow
  norm_num

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le {α β : Type} [DecidableEq β] (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) : (s.image f).card ≤ s.card :=
  Finset.card_image_le

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (s : Finset α) : s.powerset.card = 2 ^ s.card := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset]

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone {a b : ℕ} (h : a ≤ b) : 2 ^ a ≤ 2 ^ b := by
  exact Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) h

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset (α : Type u) (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s := by
  exact Set.empty_subset s
